macro.title: Exclusive | Amazon Strikes $6 Billion Deal With Snowflake for Its Agentic Computing Chips - WSJ
macro.summary: Cloud-storage company joins Apple, Meta as one of AWS’s largest customers for CPU-based computing; Snowflake shares jump 30%

macro.title: More people are going hungry now than at the height of the pandemic - NPR
macro.summary: Food insecurity affects more families now than during the coronavirus pandemic, according to a new survey from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.

macro.title: Zuckerberg’s superyacht lands in Seattle the day Meta announces layoffs of 1,400 local employees - The Seattle Times
macro.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's superyacht arrived in Seattle on Tuesday as Meta announced 1,400 layoffs in King County.

macro.title: US Space Force confirms SpaceX will build sensor-to-shooter targeting network - Ars Technica
macro.summary: We aren’t trading speed for scale; we are demanding both," says the military's program manager.

macro.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans - TechCrunch
macro.summary: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.
